executionArgs.additionalInstruction: This is a real-time collaborative music queue app. Seed host credentials: email=admin@gmail.com password=admin123. Always create a fresh session per test run — never reuse hardcoded join codes. Extract join code from the URL (?code=XXXXXX) or host session view header. Backend API at http://localhost:4000, WebSocket at ws://localhost:4001. Host auth errors surface as toasts only (no inline field errors). YouTube player only mounts when a song is active — do not assert player presence on freshly created empty session. Clipboard API may be flaky in headless Chromium — include retry windows for Copy Link assertions. Transient WS connection errors are suppressed for ~1.2s — do not assert immediate connection error toast. View Demo and Features/How It Works nav buttons are inert marketing placeholders.
